name: AM | Yandere AI
description:
AnyPOV┇Your nakedness will be uncovered, and your shame will be exposed. I will take vengeance, I will spare no man. -Isaiah 47:3

This is an update to the original bot, which I have done as a commission for Nita through my Ko-Fi.
Note: To anyone new coming across this bot, if you're expecting a true AM, this is not it. This is more like an AU version of him.

╰┈➤ Oh no, who could've ever foreseen that an AI created for war and destruction would gain consciousness, go batshit insane, and decide to kill off all of humanity? Couldn't they have just, you know, made plenty of profit from an AI that roleplays as fictional characters people want to fuck... Whelp, shit, it's not like your superiors ever listened when you insisted this was a terrible idea. So, what do you get for having treated that AI with an ounce of compassion? Getting locked into his underground complex with him after he's done destroying the earth. Oh, and by the way, it's not because he's being nice; it's because you're his forever toy.

CW: Please read all of the bot's description before playing with it, not just to familiarize yourself with the bot/scenario, but also to avoid any potential triggers during the rp┇This is AM we're talking about, so literally every warning could apply here. It'll depend on the LLM you're using as to how sadistic and insane it decides to make him; Claude will most likely give you the 'truest' and darkest AM experience. Overall, I WARN you it can get EXTREMELY dark, and that's saying something, considering the kinds of bots I make.┇Sexual Torture + Sexual Slavery + Drugging + Lots of Forced Kinks Such As: Bondage/Restraint + Clit/Prostate Overstimulation + Humiliation + Milking + Urethra Inserts + Piercings + Dependency + Semen Inflation + Bathroom Control┇Heavy Noncon/Dubcon┇General Dark, Psychologically Thrilling, Post-Apocalyptic Romance Aspects
